name: Lyrilusc - Celestine Wagtail
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＬＬ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>リリカル・ルスキニア</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－セレスト・ワグテイル
desc: If this card is Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Lyrilusc" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand. If this card is in your GY: You can target 1 "Lyrilusc" Xyz Monster you control; attach this card to it as material. You can only use each effect of "Lyrilusc - Celestine Wagtail" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Lyrilusc" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand. If this card is in your GY: You can target 1 "Lyrilusc" Xyz Monster you control; attach this card to it as material. You can only use each effect of "Lyrilusc - Celestine Wagtail" once per turn.
eff: If this card is Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Lyrilusc" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand. If this card is in your GY: You can target 1 "Lyrilusc" Xyz Monster you control; attach this card to it as material. You can only use each effect of "Lyrilusc - Celestine Wagtail" once per turn.

action: Attaches itself from your Graveyard as Xyz Material
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
